text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates this chapter.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:

(1) a fine not to exceed $500; and

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 722. Auto. Club Svcs.
##### § 722.014 — Criminal Penalty

(a) A person commits an offense if the person violates this chapter.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:

    (1) a fine not to exceed $500; and

    (2) confinement in the county jail for a term not to exceed six months.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person violates this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by:
a fine not to exceed $500; and
confinement in the county jail for a term not to exceed six months.
